name: Provider support request
about: Request support for a new LLM provider or model
title: "[Provider]: "

---

## Provider

Which LLM provider or model should be supported? Examples: Anthropic, Cohere, Mistral, local Ollama.

## API details

Describe the API format, authentication method, and any relevant documentation links.

## Use case

Why do you need this provider? What workflows or agents use it?

## Notes

Add links to provider docs, SDK references, or example API responses if useful.
